nasb.text: ‘Do not turn to mediums or spiritists; do not seek them out to be defiled by them. I am the Lord your God.

esv.text: “Do not turn to mediums or necromancers; do not seek them out, and so make yourselves unclean by them: I am the Lord your God.

cnv.text: “你們不可轉向那些交鬼的和行法術的；不可求問他們，玷污自己；我是耶和華你們的　神。

ccb.text: 不可求问灵媒或巫师，玷污自己。我是你们的上帝耶和华。
